sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_files (file_content String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_files SELECT file('data/file1.txt'), file('data/file2.txt');
UPDATE test_files SET file_content = file('data/updated_file.txt') WHERE file_content LIKE '%sample%';
SELECT * FROM test_files WHERE file_content IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_files AS SELECT file('data/*.txt') AS file_content;
